structuralIssues.description: 5 content sections empty: standards_landscape, standards_development, stakeholder_notes, key_risks, sources_summary.

structuralIssues.title: FEICA Model EPDs cover sealant formulations — shared DPP infrastructure with ADH
structuralIssues.description: FEICA Model EPD system provides 21 published third-party verified EPDs per EN 15804+A2 for adhesive and sealant formulations. Developed jointly by FEICA, IVK, EFCC, Deutsche Bauchemie since 2016, updated 2022. Formulation-based (not product-specific) — any member can declare compliance. Sika publishes product-specific EPDs since 2012. Bostik has silicone EPDs. This infrastructure directly serves both SEA and ADH families. DPP environmental data largely pre-solved for FEICA members (~800 companies, 90% SME).
structuralIssues.action_required: Document FEICA Model EPD infrastructure in content. Cross-reference with ADH-004.

structuralIssues.title: VOC + REACH + CEN/TC 351 = compound regulatory burden for sealants, especially PU formulations
structuralIssues.description: Construction sealants face compound regulation: VOC emission limits (AgBB/DIBt strictest), REACH SVHC restrictions (isocyanates for PU, phthalates), and CEN/TC 351 dangerous substances horizontal standards under new CPR M/366. PU sealants face isocyanate exposure controls — market shifting to MS polymer hybrids with safer emissions. DPP declarations will need: VOC emission class, SVHC content, indoor air quality data alongside mechanical performance. CEN/TC 351 will standardise dangerous substance data generation methods for DPP.
structuralIssues.action_required: Document compound regulatory burden in content.key_risks. Flag CEN/TC 351 as DPP data requirement.

structuralIssues.title: European construction A&S $4.78B (2024) — silicone fastest-growing, MS polymer replacing PU
structuralIssues.description: European construction adhesives & sealants market $4.78B (2024), projected $9.39B by 2035 (CAGR 5.69%). Sealants ~43% of market. Silicone holds largest share, MS polymer hybrids growing fastest (replacing PU and silicone). Germany 15% of European market. Key players: Sika, Henkel, MAPEI, Soudal, Arkema. Broader FEICA market: €19.88B (2023), 4.57Mt. FEICA market report 2025-2030 available. SEA shares FEICA ecosystem with ADH.
